description:
Yet another cross-platform graphical process/system monitor.


Small release to include some clarification around memory/memory_graph deprecation warnings.
Other
- #2096: Fix documentation suggestions around memory_graph (thanks @gepbird for spotting and fixing this).
- #2102: Mention memory/network alias in deprecation warnings.
Internal
- #2098: Bump ratatui to 0.30.2 and ratatui-core to 0.1.2.
Full Changelog: 0.14.0...0.14.1
